hooks.command: for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then if echo "$file" | grep -q '/cli/'; then uv run --package apollos-cli ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null && uv run --package apollos-cli ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null; elif echo "$file" | grep -q '/backend/'; then uv run --package apollos-portal-backend ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null && uv run --package apollos-portal-backend ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && npx @biomejs/biome check --write "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; done
for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.env\..+|teams\.yaml)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit secret/config files (.env, teams.yaml)' >&2; exit 1; fi; done
